'''Gann''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] condemned to death for his part in a brutal massacre.

==Biography==
However, his sentence was commuted by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] along with those of [[Nevo]], [[Fraal]], and [[Lumus]] so that they could follow [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] during his hunt of [[Abal Karda]]. Gann was killed by Fett in a photo booth on [[Starstation 12]] after being interrogated by Boba Fett.

==Appearances==
*[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]] {{1st}}
